description: A runtime-written settings.json exceeding the 1 MiB parse bound is refused, producing an unknown result for every claude-code rule. The committed base carries no settings.json (a .gitkeep placeholder only) because a 1 MiB+ file cannot be committed under the fixture size gate; hostile.rs writes it at runtime.

findings.message: Cannot determine local session transcript retention window: config file exceeds the 1 MiB parse bound
findings.unknown_reason: config file exceeds the 1 MiB parse bound

findings.message: Cannot determine usage-metrics telemetry opt-out posture: config file exceeds the 1 MiB parse bound
findings.unknown_reason: config file exceeds the 1 MiB parse bound
